en.name: Asteroids
en.desc: Navigate through an asteroid field! Rotate and thrust to avoid collisions while shooting asteroids into smaller pieces. Vector graphics gaming at its finest!
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys: Left/Right to rotate, Up to thrust, Space to shoot. Large asteroids split into smaller ones. Don't get hit by any asteroid!
tips: Keep moving - staying still is dangerous
Clear small asteroids first - they're harder to hit
Use momentum to drift and shoot
The ship wraps around screen edges

zh.name: 小行星
zh.desc: 穿越小行星带！旋转和推进避开碰撞，同时将小行星射击成更小的碎片。矢量图形游戏的巅峰！
zh.howToPlay: 使用方向键或WASD移动，空格键射击。击碎大号小行星会分裂成中小号。获得更高分数，但要注意不要撞到小行星！
tips: 时刻保持移动以避免成为目标
优先射击向你飞来的小行星
注意屏幕边缘出现的小行星
使用惯性和动量来控制飞船
